name: Honey Baked Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken wings well with salt and pepper.
2. Rub each wing with oil.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. Place wings in the oven and bake for 15 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, combine soy sauce, chili sauce, honey, and garlic powder.
6. Mix the sauce evenly over the chicken wings.
7. Reduce oven temperature to 375°F (190°C) and continue baking for another 45 minutes.
8. If the sauce starts to caramelize, reduce heat further and bake until desired
